name: CIS Microsoft Windows 11 Benchmark
description: Center for Internet Security (CIS) Benchmark for Microsoft Windows 11.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
controls.description: Determines the number of unique passwords that must be associated with a user account before an old password can be reused.
controls.check_command: net accounts | Select-String "Length of password history" | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ':')[1].Trim() }
controls.remediation: Configure Password History to 24 via Group Policy (secpol.msc).
controls.impact: Prevents users from cycling through a few common passwords.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '60 or fewer days, but not 0'
controls.description: Determines the period of time (in days) that a password can be used before the system requires the user to change it.
controls.check_command: net accounts | Select-String "Maximum password age" | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ':')[1].Trim() }
controls.remediation: Configure Maximum Password Age to 42 days via Group Policy (secpol.msc).
controls.impact: Reduces the timeframe in which a compromised password can be actively exploited.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Minimum password age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
controls.description: Determines the period of time (in days) that a password must be used before the user can change it.
controls.check_command: net accounts | Select-String "Minimum password age" | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ':')[1].Trim() }
controls.remediation: Configure Minimum Password Age to 1 day via Group Policy (secpol.msc).
controls.impact: Prevents users from bypassing password history restrictions by rapidly changing their passwords.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Minimum password length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
controls.description: Determines the minimum number of characters that a password for a user account can contain.
controls.check_command: net accounts | Select-String "Minimum password length" | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ':')[1].Trim() }
controls.remediation: Configure Minimum Password Length to 14 characters via Group Policy (secpol.msc).
controls.impact: Longer passwords significantly increase resistance to brute force attacks.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Account lockout threshold' is set to '10 or fewer invalid logon attempts, but not 0'
controls.description: Determines the number of failed logon attempts that causes a user account to be locked out.
controls.remediation: Configure Account Lockout Threshold to 10 via Group Policy (secpol.msc).
controls.impact: Prevents remote network brute force script attacks.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Accounts: Limit local account use of blank passwords to console logon only' is set to 'Enabled'
controls.description: Prevents blank password accounts from connecting over network paths.
controls.remediation: Enable 'Limit local account use of blank passwords to console logon only' via registry.
controls.impact: Stops network-based remote access utilizing unauthenticated blank passwords.

controls.control_name: Ensure 'Accounts: Guest account status' is set to 'Disabled'
controls.description: Determines whether the Guest account is active or inactive.
controls.check_command: net user guest | Select-String "Account active" | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ' ')[-1].Trim() }
controls.impact: Prevents anonymous local or network authentication paths.

controls.control_name: Ensure Windows Firewall Domain Profile is Enabled
controls.description: Domain profile applies when a system is connected to its corporate network domain controller.
controls.impact: Protects host against unauthorized inbound network connections.

controls.control_name: Ensure Windows Firewall Private Profile is Enabled
controls.description: Private profile applies when connected to trusted home or office networks.
controls.impact: Protects host against unauthorized inbound network connections.

controls.control_name: Ensure Windows Firewall Public Profile is Enabled
controls.description: Public profile applies when connected to untrusted networks (e.g. coffee shops).
controls.impact: Protects host against untrusted public network endpoints.

controls.control_name: Ensure Windows Defender Real-Time Protection is Enabled
controls.description: Real-time scanning captures files as they are written or executed.
controls.impact: Ensures active malware scanning catches execution payloads immediately.
